note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 1.6 cm x 4.0 cm x 0.1 cm.
  Wound bed: 47% slough, 53% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 1.6 cm x 4.0 cm x 0.1 cm.
  Wound bed: 53% slough, 47% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Alginate dressing applied.
